description.from: For 6sec, restores HP equal to 384*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+240% ATK every 1sec. The caster cannot perform other actions while the skill is active, but all allies take 60% reduced Magic DMG.
description.to: For 6 sec, restores HP by 552*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+89.6% ATK every 6sec. The caster cannot perform other actions while the skill is active, but all allies take 60% reduced Magic DMG.
